nodes.name: 📲 WhatsApp Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives incoming WhatsApp messages from Meta's webhook

nodes.name: Extract Message Data
nodes.notes: Extracts phone number, message text, and button interactions

nodes.name: 🔄 Normalize Input
nodes.notes: Cleans and normalizes user input for consistent processing

nodes.name: Table Assigned?
nodes.notes: Checks if user has set their table number

nodes.name: 📍 Request Table Number
nodes.notes: Sends welcome message requesting table number

nodes.name: 🔢 Parse Table Number
nodes.notes: Validates and stores table number in session

nodes.name: 🎯 Main Menu
nodes.notes: Shows main menu with interactive buttons

nodes.name: 🔀 Action Router
nodes.notes: Routes user actions to appropriate handlers

nodes.name: 📋 Send Menu

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "messaging_product": "whatsapp",
  "to": "{{$json.from}}",
  "type": "document",
  "document": {
    "link": "{{$vars.MENU_PDF_URL}}",
    "caption": "📋 *{{$vars.RESTAURANT_NAME}} Menu*

*Categories:*
B = Beverages
F = Food
D = Desserts

*How to order:*
Send item codes with quantities
Example: B1 2 F3 1
(2x B1 and 1x F3)"
  }
}

nodes.notes: Sends PDF menu with ordering instructions

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "messaging_product": "whatsapp",
  "to": "{{$json.from}}",
  "type": "text",
  "text": {
    "body": "❓ *How to Use*

*1️⃣ View Menu*
Tap 'View Menu' button

*2️⃣ Add Items*
Send item codes with quantities
Example: B1 2 F3 1
(Orders 2x B1 and 1x F3)

*3️⃣ Check Cart*
Tap 'My Cart' to review

*4️⃣ Confirm Order*
Tap 'Confirm' in cart

*Need help?* Contact staff at your table."
  }
}

nodes.name: 🔍 Parse Item Codes
nodes.notes: Parses and validates item codes with quantities

nodes.name: 📊 Lookup Menu Items
nodes.notes: Fetches menu items from Google Sheets
